metadata.description: MartiX AI Skills and Plugins for GitHub Copilot CLI — standalone-first skill packages and plugin bundles for .NET, SharePoint, Markdown, and more.

plugins.name: martix-markdown
plugins.description: Standalone Markdown skill package for markdownlint authoring, lint repair, config-versus-content decisions, grouped rule routing, custom rules, Prettier coexistence, and accessibility-aware review.

plugins.name: martix-dotnet-csharp
plugins.description: Standalone .NET 10+ and C# 14+ skill package for authoring, modernization, and review workflows.

plugins.name: martix-fastendpoints
plugins.description: Standalone FastEndpoints skill package for startup, endpoint contracts, processors, transport choices, security, testing, versioning, and Native AOT workflows.

plugins.name: martix-fluentvalidation
plugins.description: Standalone FluentValidation skill package for validator authoring, built-in validator selection, RuleSets, ASP.NET Core integration, async validation, extensibility, localization, and testing.

plugins.name: martix-tunit
plugins.description: Standalone TUnit skill package for test authoring, parameterized data-driven tests, lifecycle hooks, parallel-by-default execution, async assertions, dependency injection, mocking, and migration.

plugins.name: martix-powershell
plugins.description: Standalone PowerShell cmdlet developer skill package for compiled C# cmdlet authoring and cmdlet-style advanced functions, covering base class selection, parameter declaration, pipeline, error handling, and ShouldProcess patterns.

plugins.name: martix-sharepoint-server
plugins.description: Standalone SharePoint Server skill package for classic on-prem farm solutions, WSP packaging, feature framework, event receivers, branding, site artifacts, and SharePoint 2019 / Subscription Edition guidance.

plugins.name: martix-sharepoint-spfx
plugins.description: Standalone SharePoint Framework skill package for SharePoint Online-first SPFx development with React, TypeScript, web parts, extensions, Teams and Viva integration, deployment, theming, and migration guidance.

plugins.name: martix-sharepoint-pnp
plugins.description: Standalone SharePoint PnP skill package for PnP PowerShell, CLI for Microsoft 365, PnPjs, provisioning, automation, authentication, and cross-tool delivery guidance.

plugins.name: martix-dotnet-library
plugins.description: Unified plugin assets for .NET library create, update, and review workflows.

plugins.name: martix-webapi
plugins.description: Unified plugin assets for planning and implementing new .NET 10 web apps with MartiX.WebApi guidance.
